cases.prompt: Remediate oversharing across Microsoft 365 before we roll out a new data program.

expect.label: follow the three pillars: remediate oversharing, set up guardrails, meet regulations
assess first with SharePoint Advanced Management data access governance reports
clean up EEEU (everyone except external users) and sharing links
use Restricted Access Control / Restricted Content Discovery as interim restriction
engage site owners rather than centrally stripping permissions

cases.prompt: Set up enforceable guardrails so oversharing does not creep back in SharePoint.

expect.label: secure-by-default labelling derived from SharePoint sites
apply sensitivity and container labels, reserve encryption for sensitive content
govern site lifecycle and run access reviews to prevent regression
do not encrypt everything to be safe
oversharing control is ongoing governance not a one-time cleanup
